svg.title: ChatApp animation-friendly mobile UI concept
svg.desc: Four mobile screen designs for inbox, direct messaging, group calling, and end-to-end encryption onboarding.
svg.text: An original motion-first interface inspired by rounded surfaces, bold contrast and floating actions.

g.text: Are we still on for tonight?
Save your recovery phrase before chatting.
You’ll need it on a new device.
Your phrase never leaves this device.
Each surface is a separate layer: cards, avatars, chips, bubbles and controls can animate independently.
